name: HWR_MESSAGE_SOURCE_XREF
description: This cross reference (xref) table stores relationship between the message ids and their process status on a particular source.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: The id for the message sent to a profile in a source

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is id for the source to which the message is sent

columns.Name: SENDER_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the sender's profile.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the recipient's profile.

columns.Name: IS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: This identifies whether the message has been processed

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
